mission.title: k3s: preload a docker image on the k3s node agents
mission.description: This PR adds preloading existing container images ( `docker save` format ) from `/var/lib/rancher/k3s/agent/images`

steps.title: Understand the problem
steps.description: This PR adds preloading existing container images ( `docker save` format ) from `/var/lib/rancher/k3s/agent/images`

steps.title: Apply the configuration
steps.description:
Apply the following configuration to your cluster:
```yaml
$ sudo k3s crictl images
IMAGE                                      TAG                 IMAGE ID            SIZE
docker.io/library/myimage                  latest              652014e0a66b3       82MB
```

steps.title: Verify the fix
steps.description: Confirm that the issue is resolved in your environment by testing the affected functionality.

resolution.summary:
> 
> 
> I have added images which I exported with `docker save` to `/var/lib/rancher/k3s/agent/images` and then restarted k3s. In my k8s deployment I've added the image name to `-image: <name>` , but k3s still tries to fetch the image from docker.io.
> 
> I get the following error.
> 
> `"rpc error: code = Unknown desc = failed to resolve image \"docker.io/library...`
> 
> This should work right?

Hi, I just used this feature today. It looks like an image tagged as `myimage` in docker would result, in the `containerd` embedded in k3s, as :

    docker.io/library/myimage

This can be observed through this command:

```
$ sudo k3s crictl images
IMAGE                                      TAG                 IMAGE ID            SIZE
docker.io/library/myimage                  latest              652014e0a66b3       82MB
```
codeSnippets:
$ sudo k3s crictl images
IMAGE                                      TAG                 IMAGE ID            SIZE
docker.io/library/myimage                  latest              652014e0a66b3       82MB

$ sudo k3s crictl images
IMAGE                                      TAG                 IMAGE ID            SIZE
docker.io/library/myimage                  latest              652014e0a66b3       82MB

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with k3s installed or the issue environment reproducible.
